metadata.description: Sentinel Scheduled Analytics Rule — Suspicious resource deployment in Azure subscription. MITRE Persistence (T1098). Fires on any successful subscription-level write operation in the last hour.

properties.description: Detects successful subscription-level write operations. Use in low-volume tenants where any resource creation is noteworthy.
properties.query:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where OperationNameValue endswith "/write"
| where ActivityStatusValue == "Success"
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, OperationNameValue, ResourceProviderValue, ResourceId, ActivityStatusValue
